examples: The sense of unalloyed power we often take from his music is a result, not of the weight of orchestra sound.
It was not an unalloyed victory.
Do you think the friendship me would be unalloyed satisfaction?
Why think it is an unalloyed blessing when the SEC makes public corporations publish theirs?
Obama does not regard the all-former-judge makeup of the Supreme Court as an unalloyed virtue.
